title: Gold Baby Shower Latex Balloons (30cm) Pack of 5 - Charming Decor for Celebration
features: BABY SHOWER BALLOONS: Delight your guests with these charming, high-quality gold baby shower latex balloons, perfect for creating a memorable and festive atmosphere at your special celebration.

VIBRANT GOLD COLOR: Add a touch of elegance and fun to your baby shower with these beautiful pink balloons, expertly crafted to complement your décor and leave a lasting impression on friends and family.
PERFECT SIZE: Measuring 30cm when inflated, these generously sized balloons make a striking visual impact in any space, providing a versatile decoration option for both small and large gatherings.
PACK OF 5: Bundled in a convenient pack of 5, these adorable balloons ensure that you have enough to create stunning arrangements and achieve a cohesive and eye-catching look for your event.

CHARMING DECOR FOR CELEBRATION: Ideal for baby showers, gender reveal parties, and other celebrations, these gold baby shower latex balloons contribute a delightful and joyful touch to your event setup, making your special day truly unforgettable.
description: Product Description Create a charming party scene to welcome the new arrival with these Latex Gold Baby Shower Balloons. Featuring gold "Baby Shower" lettering and hearts design printed all over, these white party balloons are a quick way to add a touch of charm to any neutral baby shower. Arrange them with foil balloons, a balloon weight and curling ribbon to create a dazzling table centrepiece or floor-standing balloon bouquet. Box Contains 1 x Balloons
